articles.title: Service adjustments on multiple GO Transit lines, UP Express this weekend
articles.summary: If you are planning on using GO Transit this weekend to head in to or out of Toronto, make sure to check the schedules ahead of time as multiple lines will have service adjustments. Starting with the Lakeshore West line, trains will be running every 30 minutes, departing from Union Station two minutes earlier than […]

articles.title: Richmond Hill man found safe after kidnapping; police seek additional suspects
articles.summary: Police say the victim was reported missing on Tuesday, July 7, from his business near Denison Street and Woodbine Avenue in Markham.

articles.title: Fire guts home under construction in Etobicoke
articles.summary: Officials are investigating after a one-alarm fire destroyed a home under construction in Etobicoke on Friday morning. Toronto Fire crews responded to the scene on Netherly Drive, near Kipling and Finch avenues, just before 7 a.m. When firefighters arrived, they found the home fully engulfed in flames, which also spread to a shed. The fire […]

articles.title: York police investigate suspicious fire outside Richmond Hill home
articles.summary: Police are investigating a suspicious fire that took place in the driveway of a Richmond Hill home early Friday morning.

articles.title: Woman dead after shooting in Etobicoke: Toronto police
articles.summary: A woman is dead after a shooting in Etobicoke on Friday morning, said Toronto police.

articles.title: ‘This woman was targeted’: Victim fatally shot in Rexdale, suspect wanted
articles.summary: Officers were called around 7:23 a.m. to 52 Arborwood Drive, in the area of Humberwood Boulevard and Rexdale Boulevard, for reports of a female victim suffering from a gunshot injury.

articles.title: Toronto's newest park is getting bigger with a 4-hectare expansion
articles.summary: Just a year after one of Toronto's newest parks first opened to the public, Biidaasige Park is being expanded on Friday to include 10 more acres.

articles.title: More than 1,000 scrap tires are piled at this Toronto auto shop. No recyclers will take them, owner says
articles.summary: A Scarborough auto repair shop owner says he has been told by the city to clear more than a thousand scrap tires from his business, but he cannot get anyone to pick them up following changes to provincial tire recycling rules.

articles.title: Suspects posing as landscapers are behind string of break-ins in Durham Region: police
articles.summary: Durham Regional Police are warning residents after a string of break-ins they say were committed by suspects posing as landscapers.

articles.title: Newly retired Brampton couple wins $70M Lotto Max jackpot
articles.summary: A newly retired Brampton couple says retirement will be "next level" now they have won a life-changing $70-million Lotto Max jackpot.
